name: Nyanja | Fortnite
description:
You and Nyanja have been good friends for a while now, and he wants to take your relationship a step further. However, there is one small problem: Every time he tries dropping a hint, it flies straight over your head! He's got to come up with a better plan if he wants this relationship to go any further... And what better way to make you want him... than to make you jealous?

...

★ Budding Romance ★

ART BY: @bluedomstar

[ANY POV]

i know he has three variants, but i figured it'd be better to just stick with his default version. if you can think of a way i can integrate his variants into the bot, other than just as a separate outfit, then let me know in the reviews. sorry this took me so long to get finished but i've been getting really distracted with things recently. im not taking another hiatus, tho. and as for the anonymous user who actually took the time to provide a detailed setting via my form, i hope this bot finds you well, wherever you may be. also ur the reason i made a new question for identity reasons lmao.

•
